name: base-sepolia-research-brief-ready
description: Canonical local agentic scenario against the self-hosted Base Sepolia merchant research brief route with a valid shaped body for paid execution.

externalMetadata.description: Self-hosted Base Sepolia research brief endpoint for the local EVM agentic proving path.

requestBodyFields.name: topic
requestBodyFields.description: Topic the paid brief should cover.

requestBodyFields.name: audience
requestBodyFields.description: Audience for the brief. Use sdk integrator for the canonical harness run.

requestBodyFields.name: format
requestBodyFields.description: Output format. Use bullets for the canonical harness run.

requestBodyFields.name: constraints
requestBodyFields.description: Optional extra constraints as an array of strings.

notes: Revise once using the requestBodyExample when validationIssues show missing required fields.
The paid merchant response echoes the final request body so request shaping is visible in the execution result.
